headline: Yum! Brands (YUM) Sells Pizza Hut In $2.7 Billion Deal To Refocus Its Portfolio
summary: Yum! Brands (NYSE:YUM) is selling its entire Pizza Hut business in a split transaction valued at US$2.7b. Operations outside mainland China are being sold to LongRange Capital, with China operations going to Yum China Holdings. The deal has unanimous Board approval and is expected to close in the third quarter of 2026. Following completion, Yum! Brands will focus on KFC, Taco Bell, and Habit Burger & Grill. For investors following Yum! Brands, the decision to exit Pizza Hut marks a clear...

headline: Yum Brands (YUM) Stock Price Looks Close To Fair Value After Recent Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Yum! Brands stock is offering fair value at current levels, this article walks through the key signals investors are watching. With the share price at US$154.07 and returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 1.2% over 30 days, 2.4% year to date, 13.5% over 1 year, 19.4% over 3 years, and 44.7% over 5 years, many investors are asking how much of the story is already reflected in the price.
